Title: Cart Merge - Anonymous Then Register
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Product available in stock; user is not yet registered; browsing store anonymously. NOTE: Registration requires email verification — auto-login does NOT occur immediately; user must verify email first, then sign in manually.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} without signing in (guest session)
[ACT] add Product_1 to cart with qty=2
[ASSERT] verify cart badge shows 2
[ACT] navigate to registration page
[ACT] register a new account with valid credentials
[WAIT] wait for 'verify your email' confirmation screen (NOT auto-login)
[ASSERT] verify storefront shows email verification prompt (cart not yet merged)
[ACT] simulate email verification (check test email inbox or use admin to confirm account)
[ACT] sign in with the newly registered account credentials
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify Product_1 present in cart with qty=2
[ASSERT] verify cart badge shows correct count
Assertions:
[STATE] guest cart items preserved after registration + email verification + manual sign-in
[DOM] Product_1 listed with qty=2 in cart
[STATE] cart badge reflects merged item count
[MATH] cart subtotal matches expected value for qty=2
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts or equivalent mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during registration and cart merge
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during merge
Failure_Signals: guest items lost after registration; cart empty for new account; qty mismatch after merge
Cleanup: Remove items from cart; delete test account if needed

Title: Cart Merge - No Duplicate SKUs
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Same Product A exists in both anonymous cart and registered user cart; user currently signed out
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] add Product A to cart with qty=2
[ACT] click user name in top header → click Logout in popup (BL-AUTH-007; data-testid="main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest
[ACT] add same Product A to cart with qty=1 as guest
[ACT] sign in with {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify exactly one line item for Product A
[ASSERT] verify qty=3 (sum of 2+1)
[ASSERT] verify no duplicate line items
Assertions:
[STATE] single line item for Product A (no duplicates)
[DOM] quantity shows 3 (merged sum)
[MATH] line total = unit price x 3
[MATH] cart subtotal correct for merged quantity
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on sign-in and cart page
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during merge
Failure_Signals: duplicate line items created for same SKU; qty not summed (shows 1 or 2 instead of 3); two separate entries in cart

Title: Cart Merge - Currency Mismatch
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
SEED REQUIRED: A registered user account whose default currency is EUR must exist in QA. Set {{EUR_USER_EMAIL}} and {{EUR_USER_PASSWORD}} env vars. Standard {{USER_EMAIL}} uses USD default — this user is insufficient. Verify EUR price list exists for test products.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest with USD currency
[ACT] add products to cart in USD as anonymous user
[ASSERT] verify guest cart shows USD prices
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}} whose default currency is EUR
[WAIT] wait for cart merge and currency switch
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify all products merged into single currency cart
[ASSERT] verify prices display in customer default currency (EUR)
[ASSERT] if product unavailable in EUR, verify warning message shown
Assertions:
[STATE] all products from both carts present after merge
[DOM] prices displayed in customer default currency (EUR)
[STATE] products without EUR price show warning 'This product is no longer available for purchase' or similar
[MATH] cart totals calculated in single currency
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during currency merge
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: mixed currencies in merged cart; USD prices shown instead of EUR; products silently dropped without warning; cart totals in wrong currency

Title: Cart Merge - Persists After Logout and Re-login
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Anonymous user adds products; user logs in (merge happens); merged cart established
Steps:

[ACT] add Product B to cart as guest
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}} (triggers merge)
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] note merged cart contents (items, quantities, subtotal)
[ACT] click user name in top header → click Logout in popup (BL-AUTH-007; data-testid="main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")
[ACT] sign in again with {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify merged cart persists with same items and quantities
[ASSERT] verify no items lost or duplicated after logout/login cycle
Assertions:
[STATE] merged cart contents identical after logout/re-login
[DOM] all items present with correct quantities
[MATH] cart subtotal matches pre-logout value
[STATE] no duplicate or missing items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart query returns same items after re-login
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: merged items lost after logout; cart empty on re-login; items duplicated after re-login; subtotal mismatch

Title: Cart Merge - Smart Merge Failure Handling
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
TOOL-LIMITATION: Network fault injection (interrupting merge mid-request) cannot be executed via MCP browser agent (requires service worker interception or proxy-level throttling). Revert to API-layer negative test: send malformed mergeCarts mutation and verify backend error response. MCP agent: verify storefront graceful error handling on API error response.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest
[ACT] add products to cart as anonymous user
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}} (normal merge)
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify cart page loads without JS crash (no unhandled exception banner)
[ASSERT] verify cart shows consistent state (either merged items or empty cart with prompt)
[API] send malformed mergeCarts mutation via Postman/curl (missing required userId)
[ASSERT] verify API returns structured error response (not HTTP 500); errors[] array populated
Assertions:
[DOM] cart page accessible and functional after login (even if merge produced no-op result)
[STATE] no JS unhandled exception displayed to user
[API] malformed merge request returns errors[] with descriptive message (not 500 Internal Server Error)
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS exceptions during normal sign-in merge flow
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS exceptions
[NETWORK] no 500 on merge API response for normal sign-in flow
Failure_Signals: page crashes on sign-in; cart inaccessible after login; API returns 500 for malformed merge request with no error detail
